en.69eaa4700000000000000000 description:
So.. your little hideout setup. You really thought no one would notice? Come on. Everything gets found eventually. Question is, who finds it first.

Lucky for you, I know people who specialize in.. making problems disappear. Move the whole thing, clean slate, no loose ends. Quiet work. Expensive work.

You want a relocation, you pay. Simple as that. No favors, no credit.

Bring the roubles, I make the call, and your exit gets.. relocated. After that? Try not to screw it up again.

** Completing this quests allows you to relocate your hideout (Repeatable) **
en.69eaa4700000000000000000 startedMessageT: Don't stall. These guys don't sit around waiting while you count pennies. Get the money, bring it in, and we'll move your little operation.
en.69eaa4700000000000000000 successMessageT:
Good. Money's clean.

I've already made the call. My people will handle the relocation, fast, quiet, no questions asked.

You'll get your chance to set things up again. Just don't pick some obvious dump this time, yeah? I'm not doing this twice for free.
en.69eaa4700000000000000000 failMessageText: Yeah, didn't think so. Come back when you're serious.
en.69eaa4700000000000000000 completePlayerM: Here. Count it if you want.
en.69eaa4700000000000000000 changeQuestMess: Still waiting on the cash. No money, no move.
